title: lathyrus boissieri
intro: Lathyrus boissieri, also known as Boissier's pea or hairy vetchling, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Lathyrus boissieri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and even exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Lathyrus boissieri can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
